title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TAGABEBE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TAGABEBE, MUNICIPALITY OF GOV. GENEROSO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL, TO HADJI HAMIRI MUSA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

chunks.text:
H. No. 14109 / 85 OG No. 51, 64 Supp (Dec. 18 1989)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6785, November 29, 1989 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE TAGABEBE ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN BARANGAY TAGABEBE, MUNICIPALITY OF GOV. GENEROSO, PROVINCE OF DAVAO ORIENTAL, TO HADJI HAMIRI MUSA ELEMENTARY SCHOOL

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The Tagabebe Elementary School in Barangay Tagabebe, Municipality of Gov. Generoso, Province of Davao Oriental, shall hereafter be known as the Hadji Hamiri Musa Elementary School, in honor of its donor, the late Hadji Hamiri Musa.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of Education, Culture and Sports is hereby empowered and directed to issue rules and regulations to carry out the purpose of this Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JOVITO R. SALONGA

(Sgd.)

RAMON V. MITRA

President of the Senate

Speaker of the House of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on May 9, 1989 and September 15, 1989, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN P. ACOBA

(Sgd.)

QUIRINO D. ABAD SANTOS, JR.

Secretary of the Senate

Secretary of the House of Representatives

Approved: November 29, 1989

(Sgd.)

CORAZON C. AQUINO

President of the Philippines
